jobs.title: Director of Customer Experience
jobs.location: New York, New York, New York, United States
jobs.desc: About us LifeMD is a leading provider of virtual primary care, telehealth, and specialized treatment programs serving hundreds of thousands of patients nationwide. Our vertically integrated platform combines 50-state licensed providers, in-house pharmacy and lab integrations, and proprietary technology that enables safe, high-quality, and affordable care. At the heart of this transformation is our team of developers, engineers, and tech innovators building state-of-the-art systems that make healthcare smarter, faster, and more accessible. From architecting scalable backend systems to crafting intuitive user experiences, we are pushing boundaries every day. Recognized as one of the fastest-growing healthcare tech companies (#166 on Deloitte Fast 500 in 2023), LifeMD is not just a healthcare company â it's a tech company revolutionizing healthcare. About the role LifeMD is seeking a strategic, data-obsessed Director of Customer Experience to lead and elevate our remote customer operations. This role sits at the intersection of technology, clinical empathy, and operational excellence. We are looking for someone who has built and continuously evolved high-performing, technology-enabled CX organizations; deploying AI voice and chat tools, engineering data-driven performance cultures, and creating differentiated, concierge-level experiences that drive loyalty and growth. Reporting directly to the SVP of Operations Patient Experience, you will translate the executive team's vision and strategy into operational reality,surfacing the voice of the customer, driving measurable performance, and partnering cross-functionally to embed customer insights into decisions across the organization. If you thrive in fast-moving health tech environments and believe exceptional customer experience is a commercial advantage, we want to hear from you. Responsibilities Remote Contact Center Leadership Lead, scale, and continuously optimize a remote contact center team across multiple channels (voice, chat, email, SMS). Setting KPIs, driving performance expectations, and driving continuous improvement. Set and enforce service level standards, workforce management practices, scheduling, capacity models, and escalation protocols Build a high-accountability, coaching-first culture across team leads and frontline agents Customer Experience Develop and maintain service blueprints and experience standards across contact and service touchpoints that transform support from a transactional function into a driver of loyalty and advocacy Champion a culture of empathy, accountability, and customer-centricity across the entire CX organization AI Technology Integration Own the performance of AI-powered support functions including AI voice (conversational IVR), chatbots, and agent-assist tools â monitoring deflection rates, containment quality, sentiment signals, and escalation patterns Partner with Product and Engineering to evaluate, implement, and iterate on AI tooling that augments agent performance and improves resolution rates without sacrificing human connection Ensure deep integration between CX technology and broader customer-facing platforms including EHR, CRM, and marketing automation systems â¢ Stay current on emerging customer support technologies and serve as the internal subject matter expert on responsible AI use within a healthcare context Data-Driven Performance Management Define, track, and improve core CX metrics: first contact resolution, average handle time, CSAT, NPS, escalation rate, AI containment rate, retention, and reactivation Monitor NPS trends surfaced through the CX function and partner with the Manager of Patient Experience to close the loop on customer feedback and drive operational improvements Build and maintain dashboards and reporting cadences that provide real-time operational visibility to your team and to the SVP Conduct root cause analysis on performance gaps and translate findings into structured improvement plans Synthesize customer insights, VOC data, and operational trends into clear, executive-ready briefings Commercial Impact Customer Lifecycle Align CX operations with revenue and retention goals, connecting CSAT, NPS, and resolution metrics to commercial outcomes including retention, upsell conversion, and reactivation Identify patterns in customer friction that represent risk to renewal, referral, or acquisition, and advocate for fixes cross-functionally Support onboarding and activation workflows that reduce time-to-value; contribute to behavioral engagement and churn prediction strategies Quality Assurance Design and maintain a rigorous QA framework covering interaction quality, compliance, empathy standards, and clinical accuracy Establish calibration processes across QA reviewers to ensure scoring consistency and fairness Use QA insights to inform targeted coaching, training curricula, and process improvement Budget Management Manage the CX department budget within parameters, including headcount planning, vendor contracts, and technology spend Identify cost optimization opportunities without compromising service quality or customer outcomes; present trade-off analyses and recommendations Remote Transition Operational Build-Out Lead the operational transition to a fully remote customer service model, owning the end-to-end migration across people, process, technology, and compliance workstreams Partner with HR, IT, Legal, and Operations to execute the transition with minimal disruption to the customer experience, establishing remote workforce policies and tooling standards Use the transition as an opportunity to redesign foundational processes and eliminate legacy inefficiencies Team Leadership Development Recruit, develop, and retain a high-performing team of managers, team leads, QA specialists, trainers, and agents Build workforce planning, career pathing, and succession pipelines within the CX organization Design the management rhythms, coaching frameworks, and recognition programs that attract and retain top talent in a fully remote environment Cross-Functional Partnership Internal Alignment Serve as a key operational partner to the Manager of Patient Experience, ensuring alignment between customer-facing service operations and the broader patient experience program Collaborate closely with the Manager of Patient Experience to align on messaging touchpoints, technology integrations, and shared data â recognizing that the customer journey spans both functions and requires active coordination to deliver a coherent experience Support the SVP of Operations Patient Experience in executing the overall CX vision, roadmap, and resource planning Collaborate with Product, Clinical, Marketing, Sales, and Finance to embed the customer perspective in upstream decisions Prepare structured insights, trend analyses, and investment recommendations for the SVP to carry into executive forums Requirements 7+ years of progressive CX, contact center, or customer operations leadership experience, with direct people management responsibility Demonstrated experience leading remote or distributed teams of 50 or more across multiple channels and functions Hands-on experience implementing or managing AI/automation in a customer service context (chatbots, conversational IVR, agent-assist tools) Strong analytical skills â comfortable building dashboards, interpreting performance data, and translating insights into operational action Proven track record connecting CX performance to commercial outcomes including retention, reactivation, and revenue Experience managing vendor relationships including BPO partners and technology providers Experience building or maturing QA programs in a regulated or compliance-sensitive environment Demonstrated ability to manage a department budget, including headcount, vendor, and technology spend Preferred Background in health tech, digital health, telehealth, or healthcare services Familiarity with HIPAA requirements as they apply to CX operations, technology platforms, and data handling Experience with platforms such as Salesforce Service Cloud, Zendesk, Five9, Genesys, or similar CRM/WFM tools Exposure to customer and patient experience frameworks (e.g., service blueprinting, NPS program design, churn prediction models) Background in a direct-to-consumer or subscription-based business where CX plays a direct role in lifetime value Benefits Health Care Plan (Medical, Dental Vision) Retirement Plans Life Insurance (Basic, Voluntary AD D) Flexible PTO Policy Paid Holidays Short Term Disability Training Development Please mention the word **ORDERLY** and tag RNjguMjIwLjU5LjExNQ== when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNjguMjIwLjU5LjExNQ==). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.

jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
jobs.desc: Are you a talented Senior DevOps looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe. What we offer: The rate depends on your skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers. No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best. Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours. We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers. Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah? Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do. Requirements: 4+ years of experience as a DevOps Engineer At least 3 years of experience with Python or Bash 3+ years of experience with AWS/GCP/Microsoft Azure/Azure DevOps is required Experience in at least 2 commercial projects using Terraform, Kubernetes or SQL is required Strong technical skills: as a Senior DevOps, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture. Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls. Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision. Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down. Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly. NOT YOUR TECH STACK? We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in AI Agent Architecture, AI Automation Architecture, AI Engineering, Site Reliability Engineering, Platform Engineering, React Python, React Golang, Golang, React Java, React Ruby, Ruby, PHP Vue, Vue Node.js, React .NET, Android iOS, iOS Swift, Flutter Dart, Blockchain (Ethereum/Ethers.js/Wagmi/Viem/Solana), Angular Node.js, Vue .NET, Python Vue,MLOps, Data Science, Angular PHP, Angular .NET, Symfony React, Symfony Vue, Symfony Angular, Python, Symfony JavaScript Next.js TypeScript, Data Analysis, React PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, Product Management, QA Automation, QA Manual, Embedded Software Engineering, React Native Node, React Native React, React Native Ruby, React Native Python, WordPress, Android, Data Annotation, Angular, Python Node, React Node.js, Java Spring, Svelte Python, Svelte Node.js, Svelte TypeScript, Rust, Shopify JavaScript, Vue Nuxt, PHP Laravel, UI/UX Design, Animation, Graphic Design, React Node React Native, .NET C#, Electron, Scala, C++, Unreal Engine C++, Python LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience. We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire. We work with developers from 75+ countries across Europe, Latin America, North America (the U.S. and Canada), selected countries in Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), and Africa (including Morocco and South Africa).

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.desc: Are you a talented Senior Product Manager looking for a remote job where you can showcase your skills and earn competitive compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — a marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe. What we offer: Your rate will depend on your seniority level, skills, and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers and other specialists. No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — we’ll handle the business side so you can focus on delivering successful projects. Choose a schedule that works best for you. Async communication or minimal overlap with team working hours is possible. We respect your seniority, so you can expect no micromanagement or screen tracking. Communicate directly with clients and stakeholders. Many of them come from technical or product backgrounds. We’ll support you from the moment you submit your application throughout all stages of our cooperation. Most of our projects involve fast-paced startup environments — ideal for proactive and adaptable professionals. Requirements: 8+ years of experience in Product Management 8+ years of experience in Product Strategy and 5+ years of experience with SDLC/Market Competitive Analysis OR 5+ years of experience in Product Strategy and 8+ years of experience with SDLC/Market Competitive Analysis Experience with Figma and Mixpanel is a must Experience leading cross-functional product initiatives. Strong technical understanding: as a Senior Product Manager, you are expected to be able to launch products from scratch. Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls. Strong self-organizational skills — the ability to work full-time remotely with minimal supervision. Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us or the client down. Adaptability and flexibility — the ability to onboard onto a project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly. NOT YOUR TECH STACK?
